goal: Make local v0 release closeout summaries explicitly report blocking reasons and next actions when transferred real-adapter evidence cannot yet close the release.
blocked_scope: Changing verifier acceptance policy or weakening release gates
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may update the local closeout summary contract so NOT_GO outputs contain explicit blocking_reasons/operator_next_actions, focused closeout tests, current v0 readiness audit, and LLM context/working state only.
required_evidence: Closeout summary includes blocking_reasons and operator_next_actions for metadata, bundle, M6-doc, and readiness failures.
Focused closeout tests verify actionable summaries for archive metadata rejection and M6 review-doc NOT_GO readiness.
Current v0 readiness remains expected NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker.
No release GO is claimed from current local artifacts.
warnings: The current host still lacks real trained adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence.
This gate improves closeout diagnostics only; it does not accept evidence or relax readiness.

phase_notes.plan: Add explicit blocking_reasons and operator_next_actions to run_v0_release_closeout_from_bundle.py summaries.
phase_notes.audit: The closeout script currently records status plus promotion/readiness summaries, but the top-level summary does not directly tell operators which action unblocks the failed closeout.
phase_notes.build: Patch closeout summary helper logic, focused tests, docs/CONTEXT.md, docs/WORKING.md, and refresh current NOT_GO readiness audit.
phase_notes.check: Run focused closeout tests, py_compile, current NOT_GO readiness verification, JSON validation, search evidence, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this closeout diagnostics phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: Local v0 closeout actionable NOT_GO summary, focused closeout tests, current v0 readiness audit, LLM context/working state, and PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product behavior changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no M6 GO doc edits, no adapter/model/Docker evidence commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
pabcd.plan: Add explicit blocking_reasons and operator_next_actions to run_v0_release_closeout_from_bundle.py summaries.
pabcd.audit: The closeout script currently records status plus promotion/readiness summaries, but the top-level summary does not directly tell operators which action unblocks the failed closeout.

pabcd.check: Run focused closeout tests, py_compile, current NOT_GO readiness verification, JSON validation, search evidence, and diff checks.
pabcd.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this closeout diagnostics phase.
